strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (15+ years), exceeding seniority requirements.
Direct experience with primary stack technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and AI agent development.
Strong engineering fundamentals, including architecture, testing (TDD), and dev-ops practices (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD).
concerns: Specific primary stack items like Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly mentioned.
Kotlin and Python, though listed as required languages, are not prominently featured or absent (Python).
Lack of explicit detail on authentication/authorization/security best practices, although this is expected at a senior level.

key_factors.factor: Core Stack Match (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AI)
Missing Stack Specifics (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, Python)

response.justification: Bogdan presents as a highly experienced and versatile full-stack engineer with a strong "software craftsman" approach. His extensive background covers web, mobile, and even embedded systems, demonstrating deep technical breadth. He has direct experience with key technologies like TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and critically, AI agent development, which is a specific requirement. While some specific frameworks (Nest.js, Vitest) and languages (Kotlin, Python) are not explicitly highlighted, his strong foundational skills, TDD focus, and continuous learning (workshops, open source) suggest high adaptability to pick up new technologies quickly. He also meets all core qualifications including a CS degree and customer focus.
